Rigorous Quality Inspection

At Kyaw Kyar, every car must pass strict multi-stage checks—from documentation to a final test drive—before it is listed in our showroom.

How We Inspect Every Car

STEP 01

Document & History Verification

We verify registration, ownership history, and mileage data. If anything does not match, the car is not listed in our showroom.

STEP 02

Physical & Mechanical Inspection

Our skilled technicians inspect the engine, transmission, and chassis in detail.

STEP 03

Performance & Road Test

We conduct a test drive on the road and check braking and handling performance.

STEP 04

Independent Quality Approval

Our quality team performs a final review. Only cars that meet our standards are listed in the showroom.

Quality Comes Before Everything

We never list cars that do not meet our standards.

Kyaw Kyar

For over 15 years, we've been helping families across Myanmar find their perfect vehicles. With the largest inventory and most trusted service, we're your reliable car buying partner.
